message:
test: cover LIKE probe span field + record-serializer capacity reuse

Two unrelated test-only additions bundled because they're both one-
file test-tree changes:

- crates/fsqlite-planner/src/lib.rs: the extract_probe_like_prefix_
  as_range test's Expr::Like fixture was missing the `span` field
  that Expr::Like requires. Added `span: Span::ZERO` so the test
  compiles after the AST shape change from the earlier AccessPath
  InList commit.

- crates/fsqlite-types/src/record.rs: new test
  opt_a2_precomputed_header_vec_serializer_reuses_capacity_without_tail.
  The append-based serializer (commit 27e2d9dd) removed the tail
  truncate. This test makes sure the serializer-into-Vec variant:
  1. Computes the exact size via record_iter_with_precomputed_
     header_exact_size — for a 4-value record with all one-byte-
     varint-or-null kinds this should match serialize_record's
     length byte-for-byte.
  2. Doesn't grow past the allocator's current capacity when the
     provided buffer already has enough headroom — buf starts at
     capacity 1024 and stays at 1024 after the encode.
  3. Produces a byte-identical result to the reference Vec-based
     serialize_record.

Guards the combination (precomputed header + append + exact-size
estimator + pre-grown Vec) that the hot path uses but that no
existing test covered end-to-end.
